label: Angry Vein Clock
prompt:
Create a new premium iOS/Android app icon in the exact same visual style as the reference image.
Match the reference style: dark smoky black/charcoal background, sculptural high-contrast monochrome centerpiece, dramatic top-left lighting, premium glossy/metal motivational feel, strong centered silhouette.
New symbol: an angry manga/anime anger mark transformed into an alarm clock. The symbol should feel like a furious wake-up alarm: two small alarm bells, circular clock center, angry vein/cross-burst energy, one tiny crimson WakeSaga signal accent.
Keep it simple and iconic. It must read at 44px as an alarm clock with angry anime energy.
Constraints: square 1024x1024, full-bleed opaque background, no text, no letters, no numbers, no UI, no phone, no detailed scene, no character face, no watermark, no white outer border, no medical cross, no weapon, no tiny detail dependency.
Composition: the manga anger vein mark is the main clock face, with subtle alarm bells at the top and a crimson slash-hand across the center.
